M11 = 1.301483038 - 0.02916454060*sin(2*theta3) + 0.08733741015*cos(2*theta3)

M12 = 0.8235942236 - 0.02916454060*sin(2*theta3) + 0.08733741015*cos(2*theta3)

M13 = -0.1852683440*sin(theta3) - 0.03011592105*cos(theta3)


M21 = 0.8235942236 - 0.02916454060*sin(2*theta3) + 0.08733741015*cos(2*theta3)

M22 = 0.8235942236 - 0.02916454060*sin(2*theta3) + 0.08733741015*cos(2*theta3)

M23 = -0.1852683440*sin(theta3) - 0.03011592105*cos(theta3)


M31 = -0.1852683440*sin(theta3) - 0.03011592105*cos(theta3)

M32 = -0.1852683440*sin(theta3) - 0.03011592105*cos(theta3)

M33 = 0.2041563862 - 0.02000000000*cos(theta2)^2 + (-0.02000000000 + 0.04000000000*cos(theta2)^2)*cos(theta1)^2 - 0.04000000000*sin(theta1)*cos(theta2)*cos(theta1)*sin(theta2)
